# External Research Index

Chronological index of research drops from the Slack AI scanner. See
`~/.claude/slack-scanner/` for the scanner source. Each drop is an analysis
of an external tool, pattern, or research artifact discovered in
`#ai-*` channels in the zerobias.org Slack workspace, scored for SME Mart
relevance.

## 2026-04-09

- [pattern-skills-vs-mcp](2026-04-09-pattern-skills-vs-mcp.md) — Two-layer agent architecture: knowledge in skills, execution in MCP. 100x context reduction pattern (relevant: Plan 033 P5, Plan 074)

## 2026-04-10

- [tool-promptql](2026-04-10-tool-promptql.md) — Hasura's multiplayer AI workspace: thread-per-resource, wiki-from-conversations, permission-aware messaging patterns (relevant: Plan 065, Plan 078)
- [research-ai-ml-supply-chain-risks](2026-04-10-research-ai-ml-supply-chain-risks.md) — Joint 8-nation AI/ML supply chain security framework (ASD, NSA, NCSC, et al.). Vendor attestation category taxonomy (relevant: Plan 041 completed)

## 2026-04-13

- [pattern-coralos-marketplace](2026-04-13-pattern-coralos-marketplace.md) — Multi-agent interop network with shared thread coordination and marketplace-first UX. Composable agent architecture pattern (relevant: Plan 033 P5, Plan 065)
- [ceo-miro-cross-engagement-audit-model](2026-04-13-ceo-miro-cross-engagement-audit-model.md) — **CRITICAL**: Brian CEO notes + Miro board — cross-engagement multi-3PAO audit model with selective disclosure, twin boundaries, task-level grants, Publish-to-Shared pipeline. Introduces plans CE1–CE6, reshapes 071/078/080/064/041/056.
